spec.rawSql:
SELECT fetched_at,  load_1, load_5, load_15, (mem_free * 100) / mem_total  mem_free,  cpu_idle_pct, source_node_name
FROM "velop"."system"
WHERE  $__timeFilter(fetched_at)
AND source_node_name = '$nodelist';

SELECT  bh.fetched_at, p.name||' <-> '||c.name ||' via '|| bh.intf ||'/'||bh.chan route, bh.speed
FROM "velop"."backhaul" bh
   , "velop"."node" p
   , "velop"."node" c
WHERE  bh.chan != 'wired'
AND   bh.fetched_at BETWEEN ${__from} AND ${__to}
AND   bh.snapshot_id = p.snapshot_id
AND   bh.snapshot_id = c.snapshot_id
AND   bh.parent_ip = p.ip
AND   bh.node_ip = c.ip
ORDER BY bh.fetched_at desc;

SELECT  fetched_at, node_ip||' -> '||parent_ip ||' via '|| intf route,  rssi
FROM "velop"."backhaul"
WHERE state = 'up' and chan != 'wired'
ORDER BY fetched_at desc;

SELECT  bh.fetched_at, p.name||' <-> '||c.name ||' via '|| bh.intf ||'/'||bh.chan route, bh.rssi
FROM "velop"."backhaul" bh
   , "velop"."node" p
   , "velop"."node" c
WHERE  bh.chan != 'wired'
AND   bh.fetched_at BETWEEN ${__from} AND ${__to}
AND   bh.snapshot_id = p.snapshot_id
AND   bh.snapshot_id = c.snapshot_id
AND   bh.parent_ip = p.ip
AND   bh.node_ip = c.ip
ORDER BY bh.fetched_at desc;

SELECT  fetched_at, node_ip||' -> '||parent_ip ||' via '|| intf route,  rssi
FROM "velop"."backhaul"
WHERE state = 'up' and chan != 'wired'
ORDER BY fetched_at desc;

SELECT  fetched_at, target,loss_pct, rtt_min, rtt_avg, rtt_max
FROM "velop"."ping"
WHERE  $__timeFilter(fetched_at)

SELECT
  d.fetched_at                                                AS "time",
  w.rssi                                                      AS rssi
FROM velop.device d
LEFT JOIN velop.wlan_client w
       ON d.snapshot_id = w.snapshot_id
      AND lower(d.mac) = lower(w.client_mac)
WHERE d.fetched_at::BIGINT BETWEEN ${__from} AND ${__to}
ORDER BY "time" ASC, name;

spec.name: nodelist

spec.query:
SELECT  source_node_name
FROM "velop"."system"
WHERE fetched_at = (SELECT max(fetched_at) FROM "velop"."system")
ORDER BY source_node_name ;
spec.rawSql:

FROM "velop"."system"
WHERE fetched_at = (SELECT max(fetched_at) FROM "velop"."system")
ORDER BY source_node_name ;

FROM "velop"."system"
